sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ الْمَثَلُ: «قُلْ لِي مَنْ صَدِيقُكَ أَقُلْ لَكَ مَنْ أَنْتَ».
sentences.translation: Poslovica kaže: «Reci mi ko ti je prijatelj, reći ću ti ko si ti».
sentences.translationEn: The proverb says: «Tell me who your friend is and I will tell you who you are».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ أَصْدِقَاءَنَا يُؤَثِّرُونَ فِي شَخْصِيَّتِنَا.
sentences.translation: To znači da naši prijatelji utiču na naš karakter.
sentences.translationEn: This means that our friends influence our character.

sentences.arabic: اخْتَارَ رَامِيٌّ أَصْدِقَاءَ طَيِّبِينَ يُحِبُّونَ الْعِلْمَ.
sentences.translation: Rami je izabrao dobre prijatelje koji vole znanje.
sentences.translationEn: Rami chose good friends who love knowledge.

sentences.translation: Postao je poput njih - ljubitelj knjige i učenja.
sentences.translationEn: He became like them, a lover of books and learning.
